arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ، حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ، عَنْ ثَابِتٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ كُنَّا عِنْدَ عُمَرَ فَقَالَ نُهِينَا عَنِ التَّكَلُّفِ‏.‏

english.text:
We were with `Umar and he said, "We have been forbidden to undertake a difficult task beyond our 
capability (i.e. to exceed the religious limits e.g., to clean the inside of the eyes while doing ablution).

chapter.english: Holding Fast to the Qur'an and Sunnah
